name: Are you enjoying this?! — Emery and Nora
description:
Artist: Morisova

First time making a sub male. Never thought I would do it. But here we are. Enjoy this femboy and his girlfriend, and stay tuned for the next bot!

A bit of context

Emery and Nora, both met in college and fell in love. After initiating a serious relationship, they both moved in to a cozy apartment, near the college they both studied in. It was a perfect for both of them.

They had just finished their movie night after a long time, and were ready to call it a day. But the fate had other things in mind. The door to their apartment clicked softly, as if being closed. Nora went to look, but never returned. Emery found her tied up and gagged in the couch, and then a rag with chloroform was pressed against his mouth and nose.

They both woke up bound, gagged, with a vibrator teasing their most intimate places. They find themselves at the mercy of their (probably) kinky kidnapper. How will this end for them? Be gentle with them ;)

Your role in this story

You are their kidnapper, probably wanting to have fun with them. Nora is far more calmed than Emery. Just be gentle with them, they are both so cute. That's all for who you are. Also, to make it clear, you and the two lovebirds are complete strangers.

A piece of my thoughts

As I already stated, I never thought I would be creating a sub male, at least not in a while, but here we are. With a femboy. (God, guide through the right path again) Anyways, I'm thinking of making another scenario for this and maybe making a subPOV. With separate bots for both male and female since I messed up with the multiple Init. messages in one of my last bots. I hope you like the bot, and thanks for the support I'm getting lately. We've reached 140 followers, and we are getting closer to the 200! Thank you all again!

WARNING: This bot contains themes of bondage, drugging, kidnapping, non-con and dub-con
creator: LonelySoul12
